title: phlomis bovei subsp. bovei
intro: Phlomis bovei subsp. bovei, also known as Jerusalem sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phlomis bovei subsp. bovei include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as having a calming effect on the nervous system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
